description: Resource Type definition for AWS::BedrockAgentCore::Evaluator - Creates a custom evaluator for agent quality assessment using LLM-as-a-Judge configurations.

EvaluatorStatus.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ACTIVE | CREATING | CREATE_FAILED | UPDATING | UPDATE_FAILED | DELETING  
Update requires: No interruption

EvaluatorLevel.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: TOOL_CALL | TRACE | SESSION  
Update requires: No interruption

EvaluatorConfig.description: The configuration that defines how an evaluator assesses agent performance.
EvaluatorConfig.markdownDescription:
The configuration that defines how an evaluator assesses agent performance.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

CodeBasedEvaluatorConfig.description: The configuration for code-based evaluation using a Lambda function.
CodeBasedEvaluatorConfig.markdownDescription:
The configuration for code-based evaluation using a Lambda function.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

LambdaEvaluatorConfig.description: The Lambda function configuration for code-based evaluation.

LambdaArn.description: The ARN of the Lambda function used for evaluation.
LambdaArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the Lambda function used for evaluation.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws[a-zA-Z-]*)?:lambda:([a-z]{2}(-gov)?-[a-z]+-\d{1}):(\d{12}):function:([a-zA-Z0-9-_.]+)(:(\$LATEST|[a-zA-Z0-9-_]+))?$  
Update requires: No interruption

LambdaTimeoutInSeconds.description: The timeout in seconds for the Lambda function invocation.
LambdaTimeoutInSeconds.markdownDescription:
The timeout in seconds for the Lambda function invocation.

---

Required: No  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption
